title: Our Products and Patents — Ethical Web AI
description: AI Vault and the Ethical Web Search platform: two patent-protected products securing the assets that will decide AI's future.

list.text: AWS accredited solution. Available on AWS Marketplace
A gift to Data Protection Officers with complete control, visibility and measurability of data protection compliance
Radically new way to search that is completely anonymous and extremely precise
It was independently valued at $4.7bn in 2021; now, because of AI, it is worth much more
A summary of the benefits of the Ethical Web Search Platform
A new way to search the Internet
Delivered and built as community-level super apps
A podcast that discusses how the Ethical Web Search platform fixes the future of AI
Whoever owns this technology will have unique access to an AI super database of real-time data on global products and services availability.
